title: Here's Why Welltower (WELL) Shares Gain 10.5% in Past 6 Months
text: Improving SHO portfolio fundamentals, portfolio restructuring initiatives and capital recycling efforts drive Welltower's (WELL) shares 10.5% up in the past six months.

title: Why I Stopped Buying Treasuries To Buy REITs Instead
text: Treasuries now offer a 5.5% yield. Many investors are turning to Treasuries for safety.

title: REITs Will Go Bankrupt? Not So Fast
text: REITs are facing an "existential crisis" according to some investors. They claim that REITs will go bankrupt as they fail to refinance their debt.

title: Welltower: WELL On The Road To Recovery
text: Welltower recently turned in a strong first quarter with material same store NOI growth across its portfolio. It has key near-term and long-term growth drivers, and carries a strong balance sheet.

title: Welltower (WELL) Q1 FFO Tops, SHO Occupancy Up, '23 View Raised
text: Welltower's (WELL) Q1 earnings outshine estimates on better-than-anticipated revenues. The SHO portfolio occupancy improves year over year.

title: Why Welltower Stock Rallied More Than 10% in April
text: Welltower benefitted from several analysts' upgrades and price target increases. Analysts see better days ahead for the REIT.
